summary.intent: Address three PR review comments on model rediscovery: move Ollama probes outside a write lock, make runtime API keys visible during rediscovery, and remove dead code.
summary.outcome: All three issues fixed: introduced `RediscoveryResult` struct to pre-fetch Ollama probes before acquiring locks, switched `LiveModelService` env_overrides to `Arc<RwLock<HashMap>>` for runtime updates, removed dead `rediscover_models` method. All 307 tests passing.

repo: Ollama probes (`probe_ollama_models_batch`) are I/O-bound and must not be called while holding the model registry write lock — fetch results beforehand and pass them in.

`LiveModelService` previously snapshotted env overrides at construction time; runtime UI-stored API keys must be wired through `Arc<RwLock<HashMap>>` updated in `server.rs` after MCP env overrides are computed.
`LiveProviderSetupService` already solved the env_overrides sharing pattern and serves as the reference implementation.
Model registration logic lives in `register_rediscovered_models`; discovery logic lives in `fetch_discoverable_models` — these are intentionally separate in `crates/providers/src/lib.rs`.

code.finding: New `RediscoveryResult` struct bundles discovered models and pre-fetched Ollama probes so callers can pass a single value to `register_rediscovered_models`, keeping Ollama internals (`OllamaShowResponse`) private.
Added `probe_ollama_models_batch_async` alongside the existing sync `probe_ollama_models_batch`; async version is called from `fetch_discoverable_models` before the lock is acquired.
`LiveModelService.env_overrides` changed from owned `HashMap` to `Arc<RwLock<HashMap>>` so the gateway can push runtime updates post-construction.
Runtime env overrides (from `CredentialStore`/MCP) must be explicitly synced into the model service's `Arc<RwLock>` after the MCP env overrides update — this wiring was missing before.

workflow: Keeping `RediscoveryResult` opaque (not exposing `OllamaShowResponse` publicly) avoids leaking provider-internal types across crate boundaries.
Using a local empty `HashMap` is simpler than a `static` when you need a fallback reference for an optional map field.
Compile → fmt → clippy → test sequence confirmed all clean before committing review fixes.

friction: Multiple rounds of file reads were needed to locate `register_rediscovered_models` and `rediscover_models` because grep patterns were iteratively refined.
Visibility of `OllamaShowResponse` caused a mid-implementation pivot: initially tried making it `pub`, then restructured to keep it private by making `RediscoveryResult` opaque.
Finding the correct call-site in `server.rs` to wire the runtime env override update required re-reading a large file multiple times.
open_items: The sync `probe_ollama_models_batch` function remains; consider removing it if it has no remaining callers after this change.
Tests were updated to use `RediscoveryResult` but the transcript does not confirm edge-case tests for the new async probe path or the runtime env override update path specifically.
